subject: refactor(ui): normalize z-index values to glow-props standard scale
body:
Audited and aligned all z-index values to the standardized Z_INDEX_SCALE
from glow-props. The previous values were ad-hoc and didn't follow a
consistent layering system, risking stacking conflicts as new UI layers
(toasts, debug overlays) are added.

Changes:
- Sticky header: z-40 → z-20 (Sticky headers layer)
- Save Modal: z-50 → z-60 (Modal layer)
- Comparison View modal: z-50 → z-60 (Modal layer)
- Sticky thead z-10: already correct (Base content layer)
- Extended Tailwind config with z-60/70/80 named utilities

Scale: 0-10 base, 20 sticky, 30 sheets, 40 backdrop, 50 menu,
60 modal, 70 toast, 80 debug.

Tags: ui, z-index, infrastructure, tailwind
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: infrastructure
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: z-index-scale
Semver: patch
